zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sydenham MP於1493年出生在英國薩默塞特布普頓時，他的父親Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton25歲，母親Elizabeth Touchet25歲。他於大約1520年與Ursula Brydges在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年4月16日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布普頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特布普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sydenham MP was born in 1493, in Brympton, Somerset, England, his father, Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Touchet, was 25. He married Ursula Brydges about 1520, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 16 April 1557, in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Brympton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sydenham MP est né en 1493, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Touchet, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ursula Brydges environ 1520, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 16 avril 1557, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre.

Er hat um 1520 in Gloucestershire, England Ursula Brydges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 16. April 1557 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brympton, Somerset, England begraben.

Lui sposato Ursula Brydges circa 1520, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. ko.Combe, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 코브 스트 닉홀아스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sydenham MP(이)가 1493년 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Touchet(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1520년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Ursula Brydges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 4월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리프턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sydenham MP nasceu em 1493, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Touchet, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ursula Brydges aproximadamente 1520, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de abril de 1557, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.Combe, Somerset, England: комб ст ничолас, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sydenham MP родился в 1493 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Touchet, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ursula Brydges около 1520 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 16 апреля 1557 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия.

Se casó con Ursula Brydges aproximadamente 1520, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 16 de abril de 1557, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
